title: AN ACT DECLARING APRIL 15 OF EVERY YEAR AS PRESIDENT MANUEL A. ROXAS DAY WHICH SHALL BE OBSERVED AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAPIZ AND THE CITY OF ROXAS

chunks.text:
H. NO. 976 / 97 OG No. 32, 4720 (Aug. 6, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9067, April 08, 2001 ]

AN ACT DECLARING APRIL 15 OF EVERY YEAR AS PRESIDENT MANUEL A. ROXAS DAY WHICH SHALL BE OBSERVED AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAPIZ AND THE CITY OF ROXAS

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. April 15 of every year is hereby declared as President Manuel A. Roxas Day which shall be observed as a special working public holiday in the Province of Capiz and the City of Roxas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 6, 2001 and May 29, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 08, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
